title: The Void Breach
description: Reality is failing. The Nexus Bastion's shields are weakening. Someone must investigate the source.

stages.text: Warden Kyros grips the railing of the observation deck, knuckles white. Below, the Abyss churns — darker than usual, more active. 'The shields are failing. Something is eating them from the outside. Three probe teams have gone into the Shattered Expanse and none returned. I need someone who can survive the impossible.' He turns to you. 'Find out what's attacking us. Stop it.'

choices.label: Scout the perimeter for the attack source

stages.text: Deep in the Shattered Expanse, you find the source — an entity feeding on the barrier between realities. It's not attacking the shields; it's eating the reality they're anchored to. If it finishes, the Nexus Bastion will fall into the Abyss.

choices.label: Lure it away from the shields

stages.text: The entity retreats. The shields stabilize. Kyros meets you at the gate with a rare smile. 'You've bought us time. Maybe enough. The scholars are already working on permanent reinforcements.' He hands you a chest of supplies and rare materials. 'The Bastion stands because of you.'

title: Hunt the Sovereign
description: The Void Sovereign stirs. A preemptive strike is the only option.

stages.text: Scholar Vera's instruments are screaming. 'The Sovereign is waking. Not fully — not yet — but it's dreaming, and its dreams are becoming real. Every nightmare creature, every reality fracture, every surge of void energy — they're all symptoms of its approach.' She spreads a map of the Voidspire. 'We need to weaken it before it fully manifests. Strike at its anchors — the nodes it uses to pull itself into our reality.'

choices.label: Study the anchor locations on the map
Prepare a void-walker ritual to trace the anchors
Gear up for a long expedition

stages.text: You find the first anchor — a crystal of compressed void embedded in the Abyssal Rift. Destroying it sends shockwaves through the Voidspire. The ground shakes. The sky tears. Something vast and dark notices you.

choices.label: Destroy the second anchor before it can respond
Shield yourself against the Sovereign's attention
Use the shockwave to locate the remaining anchors

stages.text: Three anchors destroyed. The Sovereign's approach slows dramatically. Vera's instruments calm. 'It's retreating — not defeated, but delayed. Possibly for years.' She presses a container of sovereign ichor into your hands. 'Harvested from the destroyed anchors. Use it well. You've earned it.'
